1386.one_line_summary: Attestation management contract for issuing, validating, and revoking cryptographic attestations.
1386.notes: Part of attestation ecosystem (1386, 1387, 1388). Enables off-chain signed attestations to be verified on-chain with revocation via bloom filters.

1387.one_line_summary: Merkle tree attestations with privacy support for verifying claims without revealing full attestation.
1387.notes: Privacy-preserving attestation standard allowing partial revelation via Merkle trees; complements ERC-1386.

1388.one_line_summary: Registry for managing lists of trusted attestation issuers with specific capabilities and expiry.
1388.notes: Curated registry allowing smart contracts to trust attestation issuers; part of attestation ecosystem.

1417.one_line_summary: Modular poll standard supporting flexible voting schemes with membership qualification.
1417.notes: Modularized governance enabling diverse voting types (token-proportional, quadratic, delegated) via permissioning.

1438.topic_other: dApp component registry (avatar/badge store) and universal wallet
1438.one_line_summary: Avatar store and universal wallet for reusable dApp components across Ethereum ecosystem.
1438.notes: Proposes component-based architecture for avatars/badges and unified ERC-20 wallet; falls outside standard taxonomies.

1444.one_line_summary: Decentralized localization system converting machine codes to human-readable text in any language.
1444.notes: Registry and proxy pattern for multilingual message translation; integrates with ERC-1066 status codes.

1450.one_line_summary: RTA-controlled security token with exclusive transfer authority and KYC/AML compliance mechanisms.
1450.notes: Regulated securities with Registered Transfer Agent exclusive control; disables standard ERC-20 transfer/approve; supports recovery and court orders.

1462.one_line_summary: Base security token with compliance checking functions and legal document attachment.
1462.notes: Minimal security token extension adding transfer/mint/burn checks and document references; foundational rather than prescriptive.

1484.one_line_summary: Digital identity aggregator protocol supporting multiple associated addresses and resolver contracts.
1484.notes: Un-opinionated identity registry enabling complex identity applications via associated addresses and resolvers; DID-compatible.

1491.topic_other: human capital accounting tokens based on BDI model
1491.one_line_summary: Human capital accounting standard tracking experience, reputation, and talents via BDI agent model.
1491.notes: Speculative proposal applying belief-desire-intention framework to token-based human capital; incomplete implementation status.

1504.one_line_summary: Upgradable smart contract pattern with separate handler/data contracts and optional voting mechanism.
1504.notes: Contract architecture for bug fixes and improvements via handler swapping while preserving data; includes governance component.

1523.one_line_summary: Insurance policy standard based on ERC-721 with policy-specific metadata structure.
1523.notes: Specialized NFT for insurance contracts with carrier, risk, and premium metadata; applies 721 to regulated assets.

1538.one_line_summary: Transparent contract standard enabling atomic function upgrades with event logging.
1538.notes: Superseded by ERC-2535 (Diamond); pioneered modular upgradability via delegatecall with documented change history.

1577.one_line_summary: ENS contenthash field for mapping names to distributed content via multicodec format.
1577.notes: Deprecates ENS 'content' and 'multihash' fields; supports IPFS, Swarm, and other protocols via machine-readable multicodec.

1581.one_line_summary: BIP32 key derivation path for non-wallet applications (messaging, signing, etc.).
1581.notes: Hierarchical key derivation using m/43'/60'/1581' prefix; enables separate identity keys independent from wallet keys.
